name: Geo Greymon

signature_move.name: Mega Flame
signature_move.description: Spews ultra-high-temperature flames from its mouth and reducing everything to ashes.

description: A unique Digimon that is conjectured to be a subspecies of Greymon . Its entire body as well as the carapace on its head have also developed to become like lethal weapons, giving it a more aggressive appearance. Its Special Move " Mega Flame " is spewing ultra-high-temperature flames from its mouth and reducing everything to ashes. It can also charge its " Mega Flame " to the limit within its mouth, then fire it with explosive power as " Mega Burst ". Furthermore, its " Horn Impulse ", in which it charges with its gigantic horns and pulverizes the opponent, is also a powerful attack.
